name: HMS MTB 260 (MTB 260)
events: 31 Jan 1943 In a signal timed 1737 A/31, the Capt. S.10 informed HMS P 46 (Lt. J.S. Stevens, DSC, RN) and HMS Una (Lt. J.D. Martin, RN) that Allied motor torpedo boats [this were HMMTB 260, HMMTB 264, HMMTB 307, HMMTB 313] will be operating continuously in the Kuriat area from tonight 31st until 0100/4th. They were ordered not to attack submarines. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
